meta.description: Compressed hunt cards for sui-move — one-line detection rules for bulk scanning
meta.usage: Load cards into context. For each card, grep target code for card.grep. On hit: execute card.check steps directly, use validWhen/invalidWhen/impact for rapid triage, and only read full DB entry (card.ref + card.lines) for confirmed true/likely positives.

cards.title: Move Access Control and Authorization Vulnerabilities

cards.title: Pattern 1: Public Signer Capability Exposure — move-acl-001
cards.detect: Public function returns signer for any distributor
check: VERIFY: Public function returns signer for any distributor
PROVE: Protocol creates a resource account with SignerCapability stored; A public function returns the signer from the capability without authorization
FALSIFY: Make signer retrieval friend-only or internal
ANTIPATTERN: Initialization uses signer-derived address, but access uses hardcoded
cards.antipattern: Initialization uses signer-derived address, but access uses hardcoded
cards.securePattern: Make signer retrieval friend-only or internal
cards.validWhen: Public function returns signer for any distributor
cards.invalidWhen: Make signer retrieval friend-only or internal

cards.title: Pattern 2: Missing Authorization on Sensitive Functions — move-acl-002
cards.detect: No access control on trading account retrieval
check: VERIFY: No access control on trading account retrieval
PROVE: Protocol exposes a function that performs a sensitive action (trading, payload marking, messaging); No check verifies the caller is authorized
FALSIFY: Move payload marking into treasury with access control
ANTIPATTERN: No authorization check on cross-chain message sending
cards.antipattern: No authorization check on cross-chain message sending
cards.securePattern: Move payload marking into treasury with access control
cards.validWhen: No access control on trading account retrieval
cards.invalidWhen: Move payload marking into treasury with access control

cards.title: Pattern 3: Role Separation Violations — move-acl-003
cards.detect: OR logic lets listing admin do pool admin actions
check: VERIFY: OR logic lets listing admin do pool admin actions
PROVE: Protocol defines multiple admin roles with different permissions; Role checking logic uses OR instead of AND, or checks are incomplete
FALSIFY: Separate functions for separate roles
ANTIPATTERN: Some functions check issuer role, others check transfer_agent
cards.antipattern: Some functions check issuer role, others check transfer_agent
cards.securePattern: Separate functions for separate roles
cards.validWhen: OR logic lets listing admin do pool admin actions
cards.invalidWhen: Separate functions for separate roles

cards.title: Pattern 4: Missing Capability Revocation — move-acl-004
cards.detect: Caps can be generated but never revoked
check: VERIFY: Caps can be generated but never revoked
PROVE: Parameter update doesn't update last_used timestamp
FALSIFY: Generate and revoke capabilities
cards.antipattern: Parameter update doesn't update last_used timestamp
cards.securePattern: Generate and revoke capabilities
cards.validWhen: Caps can be generated but never revoked
cards.invalidWhen: Generate and revoke capabilities

cards.title: Pattern 5: Missing Version Checks on State Objects — move-acl-005
cards.detect: Admin functions don't check state version
check: VERIFY: Admin functions don't check state version
PROVE: Protocol upgrades package to a new version with security fixes; Admin functions or critical operations don't verify the state object version
FALSIFY: Version check on all entry points
cards.antipattern: Admin functions don't check state version

cards.validWhen: Admin functions don't check state version
cards.invalidWhen: Version check on all entry points

cards.antipattern: Doesn't verify correct SupplyPool instance

cards.validWhen: Doesn't verify correct SupplyPool instance
cards.invalidWhen: Verify supply pool matches position's expected pool

cards.title: Pattern 7: Publicly Exposed Signer Capability Enables Fund Theft — move-acl-007
cards.detect: Any caller can get the signer for any distribution
check: VERIFY: Any caller can get the signer for any distribution
PROVE: A public function returns a signer created from a stored SignerCapability; Any external caller retrieves the signer for the resource account holding funds
FALSIFY: Restrict signer access to friend modules only
cards.antipattern: Any caller can get the signer for any distribution
cards.securePattern: Restrict signer access to friend modules only

cards.title: Pattern 8: Excessive Admin Privileges Beyond Intended Scope — move-acl-008
cards.detect: Listing admin gets full config modify power
check: VERIFY: Listing admin gets full config modify power
PROVE: Access control check uses OR to allow multiple admin roles; A lower-privilege role (listing admin) gains full configuration power intended for pool admin
FALSIFY: Separate paths for different admin scopes

cards.securePattern: Separate paths for different admin scopes

cards.title: Pattern 9: Inverted Assertion Logic Allows Prohibited Actions — move-acl-009
cards.detect: Assertion is backwards — only special wallets pass
check: VERIFY: Assertion is backwards — only special wallets pass
PROVE: Developer writes assert!(is_special_wallet(addr), E_WALLET_SPECIAL) intending to block special wallets; The assertion is inverted — it requires the wallet to BE special,...
FALSIFY: Negated check blocks special wallets
cards.antipattern: Assertion is backwards — only special wallets pass
cards.securePattern: Negated check blocks special wallets
cards.validWhen: Assertion is backwards — only special wallets pass
cards.invalidWhen: Negated check blocks special wallets

cards.title: Pattern 10: Signature Replay in Claim Functions — move-acl-010
cards.detect: No nonce prevents replaying the same signature
check: VERIFY: No nonce prevents replaying the same signature
PROVE: Claim function uses signature-based authorization without nonce tracking; A valid signature can be retransmitted within the deadline window
FALSIFY: Include nonce in signature and track used nonces
cards.antipattern: No nonce prevents replaying the same signature
cards.securePattern: Include nonce in signature and track used nonces
cards.validWhen: No nonce prevents replaying the same signature
cards.invalidWhen: Include nonce in signature and track used nonces

cards.title: Pattern 11: Cumulative Claim Exceeds Entitlement — move-acl-011
cards.detect: Checks per-call, not cumulative
check: VERIFY: Checks per-call, not cumulative
PROVE: Claim function checks amount <= unlocked_tokens per call; Does NOT verify cumulative claims (amount + tokens_transferred <= unlocked_tokens)
FALSIFY: Check cumulative claims against total unlocked
cards.antipattern: Checks per-call, not cumulative
cards.securePattern: Check cumulative claims against total unlocked
cards.validWhen: Checks per-call, not cumulative
cards.invalidWhen: Check cumulative claims against total unlocked

cards.title: Pattern 12: Permissionless Function Before Time-Based Gate — move-acl-012
cards.detect: No identity check before penalty period
check: VERIFY: No identity check before penalty period
PROVE: Access control is only enforced during a penalty period (e.g., after a deadline); Before the penalty period, any caller can invoke the restricted operation
FALSIFY: Always enforce driver identity
cards.antipattern: No identity check before penalty period
cards.securePattern: Always enforce driver identity
cards.validWhen: No identity check before penalty period
cards.invalidWhen: Always enforce driver identity

cards.title: Pattern 13: Missing Capability-to-Object Ownership Validation — move-acl-013
cards.detect: No check that cap belongs to this specific vault
check: VERIFY: No check that cap belongs to this specific vault
PROVE: Function accepts a capability object (VaultOwnerCap) and a target resource (Vault); It never validates that the capability belongs to the specific target resource
FALSIFY: Validate cap ownership against vault
cards.antipattern: No check that cap belongs to this specific vault
cards.securePattern: Validate cap ownership against vault
cards.validWhen: No check that cap belongs to this specific vault
cards.invalidWhen: Validate cap ownership against vault

cards.title: Pattern 14: Missing Approval Revocation Mechanism — move-acl-014
cards.detect: Can add allowances but never remove them
check: VERIFY: Can add allowances but never remove them
PROVE: Protocol allows granting approval/deposit capabilities to addresses; No function exists to revoke granted capabilities
FALSIFY: Track and allow revocation of approvals
ANTIPATTERN: Cap is created but never added to revocable list
cards.antipattern: Cap is created but never added to revocable list
cards.securePattern: Track and allow revocation of approvals

cards.invalidWhen: Track and allow revocation of approvals

cards.title: Pattern 15: Front-Running Payload Consumption to Block Legitimate Users — move-acl-015

check: VERIFY: Anyone can call this to mark a payload as used
PROVE: A public validate_and_store_payload function marks payloads as consumed; Attacker monitors mempool for legitimate minting transactions
FALSIFY: Inline validation into the minting function

cards.title: Pattern 16: Emergency Withdrawal Bypasses Access Restrictions — move-acl-016
cards.detect: Creator can bypass emergency restrictions via FA API
check: VERIFY: Creator can bypass emergency restrictions via FA API
PROVE: Protocol has emergency withdrawal pathway intended for crisis situations; A privileged actor (deployer creator, vault owner) can bypass normal restrictions
FALSIFY: Use a non-creator resource account as the store owner

cards.securePattern: Use a non-creator resource account as the store owner
cards.validWhen: Creator can bypass emergency restrictions via FA API
cards.invalidWhen: Use a non-creator resource account as the store owner

cards.title: Pattern 17: Group/Role ID Reuse After Deletion — move-acl-017
cards.detect: Group IDs can be reused after removal
check: VERIFY: Group IDs can be reused after removal
PROVE: Admin removes a group, freeing up its numeric ID; A new group is created with the same ID as the removed one
FALSIFY: Use monotonically increasing IDs that are never reused
cards.antipattern: Group IDs can be reused after removal
cards.securePattern: Use monotonically increasing IDs that are never reused

cards.invalidWhen: Use monotonically increasing IDs that are never reused

cards.title: Pattern 18: Irrevocable Token Freeze Without Unfreeze — move-acl-018
cards.detect: No corresponding unfreeze function
check: VERIFY: No corresponding unfreeze function
PROVE: Admin can freeze token stores via coin::freeze_coin_store; No corresponding unfreeze function exists in the module
FALSIFY: Provide both freeze and unfreeze capabilities
IMPACT: Complete fund drainage through signer exposure (2/29 reports) — CRITICAL
All public functions returning signers are friend-only or internal
Every state-modifying public function has authorization check
cards.antipattern: No corresponding unfreeze function
cards.securePattern: Provide both freeze and unfreeze capabilities
cards.validWhen: No corresponding unfreeze function
cards.invalidWhen: Provide both freeze and unfreeze capabilities
cards.impact: Complete fund drainage through signer exposure (2/29 reports) — CRITICAL

cards.title: Move Arithmetic and Precision Vulnerabilities
cards.detect: Move uses unsigned integers (u8, u64, u128, u256) that abort on overflow/underflow rather than wrapping.
check: VERIFY: Move uses unsigned integers (u8, u64, u128, u256) that abort on overflow/underflow rather than wrapping.
cards.validWhen: Move uses unsigned integers (u8, u64, u128, u256) that abort on overflow/underflow rather than wrapping.

cards.title: Pattern 1: Double Scaling in Invariant Checks — move-arith-001
cards.detect: Double upscaling in flashloan repayment validation
check: VERIFY: Double upscaling in flashloan repayment validation
PROVE: Protocol applies scaling factor to balance amounts before computing invariant; Due to code error, scaling is applied twice to post-operation balances
FALSIFY: Apply metastable upscaling exactly once
ANTIPATTERN: Overly strict assertion doesn't account for rounding
cards.antipattern: Overly strict assertion doesn't account for rounding
cards.securePattern: Apply metastable upscaling exactly once
cards.validWhen: Double upscaling in flashloan repayment validation
cards.invalidWhen: Apply metastable upscaling exactly once

cards.title: Pattern 2: Division Before Multiplication Precision Loss — move-arith-002
cards.detect: Division before multiplication loses precision
check: VERIFY: Division before multiplication loses precision
PROVE: Protocol computes token amounts using division before multiplication; Integer truncation in division step loses significant precision
FALSIFY: Multiplication before division preserves precision
cards.antipattern: Division before multiplication loses precision
cards.securePattern: Multiplication before division preserves precision
cards.validWhen: Division before multiplication loses precision
cards.invalidWhen: Multiplication before division preserves precision

cards.title: Pattern 3: Division by Zero in Pool/Staking Operations — move-arith-003
cards.detect: No guard against zero reserve in division
check: VERIFY: No guard against zero reserve in division
PROVE: Pool or staking contract uses share-based accounting; Total shares or reserve amount reaches zero through withdrawal/manipulation
FALSIFY: Check for zero before division
ANTIPATTERN: Weight can be zero if node's stake is too low
cards.antipattern: Weight can be zero if node's stake is too low
cards.securePattern: Check for zero before division
cards.validWhen: No guard against zero reserve in division
cards.invalidWhen: Check for zero before division

cards.title: Pattern 4: Rounding Direction Exploits in Share Minting/Burning — move-arith-004
cards.detect: Rounding to 1 causes overpayment
check: VERIFY: Rounding to 1 causes overpayment
PROVE: Share minting rounds down, so small deposits mint 0 shares; Share burning/redemption rounds up, so withdrawals extract more than proportional share
FALSIFY: Round DOWN on minting (fewer shares), round UP on burning (more tokens needed)
ANTIPATTERN: Rounding up causes users to supply more than needed
cards.antipattern: Rounding up causes users to supply more than needed
cards.securePattern: Round DOWN on minting (fewer shares), round UP on burning (more tokens needed)
cards.validWhen: Rounding to 1 causes overpayment
cards.invalidWhen: Round DOWN on minting (fewer shares), round UP on burning (more tokens needed)

cards.title: Pattern 5: Overflow in Fee/Reward Calculations — move-arith-005
cards.detect: Overflow when token_amount * fee_bips exceeds u64::MAX
check: VERIFY: Overflow when token_amount * fee_bips exceeds u64::MAX
PROVE: Fee or reward calculation multiplies large token amounts by basis points; Intermediate multiplication exceeds u64 or u128 max
FALSIFY: Cast to u128 for intermediate calculation
cards.antipattern: Overflow when token_amount * fee_bips exceeds u64::MAX
cards.securePattern: Cast to u128 for intermediate calculation
cards.validWhen: Overflow when token_amount * fee_bips exceeds u64::MAX
cards.invalidWhen: Cast to u128 for intermediate calculation

cards.title: Pattern 6: Negative Value Mishandling in Signed Arithmetic — move-arith-006
cards.detect: Negative balance converted to large positive
check: VERIFY: Negative balance converted to large positive
PROVE: Protocol uses custom signed integer types (Move has no native signed ints); Negative intermediate values are cast to unsigned, becoming very large positive numbers
FALSIFY: Check sign before conversion
ANTIPATTERN: Subtraction can underflow if lock_time > current time
cards.antipattern: Subtraction can underflow if lock_time > current time
cards.securePattern: Check sign before conversion
cards.validWhen: Negative balance converted to large positive
cards.invalidWhen: Check sign before conversion

cards.title: Pattern 7: Faulty Constant Definitions — move-arith-007
cards.detect: Missing final digit in MAX_U64 constant
check: VERIFY: Missing final digit in MAX_U64 constant
FALSIFY: Use compiler-checked maximum value
cards.antipattern: Missing final digit in MAX_U64 constant
cards.securePattern: Use compiler-checked maximum value
cards.validWhen: Missing final digit in MAX_U64 constant
cards.invalidWhen: Use compiler-checked maximum value

cards.title: Pattern 8: Fee Accounting Denomination Errors — move-arith-008
cards.detect: Fallthrough when deep_quantity is zero
check: VERIFY: Fallthrough when deep_quantity is zero
PROVE: Returns 0 when fee_bips == MAX_FEE_BIPS
FALSIFY: Handle all fee denomination cases explicitly
cards.antipattern: Returns 0 when fee_bips == MAX_FEE_BIPS
cards.securePattern: Handle all fee denomination cases explicitly
cards.validWhen: Fallthrough when deep_quantity is zero
cards.invalidWhen: Handle all fee denomination cases explicitly

cards.title: Pattern 9: Rounding Assertion Failure in Token Conversions — move-arith-009
cards.detect: Strict inequality doesn't account for rounding
check: VERIFY: Strict inequality doesn't account for rounding
PROVE: Protocol converts between token representations (cTokens ↔ underlying, shares ↔ tokens); Strict assertion checks equality between pre- and post-conversion values
FALSIFY: Use tolerance-based comparison or consistent scaling
ANTIPATTERN: Two branches with different scaling yield different results
cards.antipattern: Two branches with different scaling yield different results
cards.securePattern: Use tolerance-based comparison or consistent scaling
cards.validWhen: Strict inequality doesn't account for rounding
cards.invalidWhen: Use tolerance-based comparison or consistent scaling

cards.title: Pattern 10: Overestimation from Rounding Up in Deposit Calculations — move-arith-010
cards.detect: safe_mul_div_up rounds up, causing overestimation
check: VERIFY: safe_mul_div_up rounds up, causing overestimation
PROVE: Protocol uses mul_div_up (ceiling division) for deposit amount calculations; Rounding up causes users to supply more tokens than necessary to maintain pool ratio
FALSIFY: Round down for amounts taken from users
cards.antipattern: safe_mul_div_up rounds up, causing overestimation
cards.securePattern: Round down for amounts taken from users
cards.validWhen: safe_mul_div_up rounds up, causing overestimation
cards.invalidWhen: Round down for amounts taken from users

cards.title: Pattern 11: Fee Calculation Overflow in Basis Point Multiplication — move-arith-011
cards.detect: u64 multiplication overflows for large amounts
check: VERIFY: u64 multiplication overflows for large amounts
PROVE: Fee calculation uses (token_amount * fee_bips) / BIPS_PRECISION in u64; For large token amounts, the intermediate multiplication overflows u64
FALSIFY: Use u128 intermediate calculation
cards.antipattern: u64 multiplication overflows for large amounts
cards.securePattern: Use u128 intermediate calculation
cards.validWhen: u64 multiplication overflows for large amounts
cards.invalidWhen: Use u128 intermediate calculation

cards.title: Pattern 12: Overpayment from Minimum Share Rounding — move-arith-012
cards.detect: Setting shares to 1 overpays at high exchange rates
check: VERIFY: Setting shares to 1 overpays at high exchange rates
PROVE: When unstaking, if computed share amount rounds to 0, protocol sets shares = 1; At high exchange rates, 1 share is worth more than the original unstake amount
FALSIFY: Abort on zero shares instead of rounding up
cards.antipattern: Setting shares to 1 overpays at high exchange rates
cards.securePattern: Abort on zero shares instead of rounding up
cards.validWhen: Setting shares to 1 overpays at high exchange rates
cards.invalidWhen: Abort on zero shares instead of rounding up

cards.title: Pattern 13: Subtraction Underflow in Time/Balance Difference Calculations — move-arith-013
cards.detect: Subtraction executes before guard check
check: VERIFY: Subtraction executes before guard check
PROVE: Code computes difference = time_a - time_b or balance_a - balance_b; Move aborts on unsigned underflow, but the subtraction is computed before the guard check
FALSIFY: Check before subtracting

cards.antipattern: deny_list_size may exceed old_epoch_used_capacity
cards.securePattern: Check before subtracting
cards.validWhen: Subtraction executes before guard check
cards.invalidWhen: Check before subtracting

cards.title: Pattern 14: Mutable Local Copy Instead of Dereference in State Update — move-arith-014
cards.detect: `mut left` is a local copy, not a mutable reference
check: VERIFY: mut left is a local copy, not a mutable reference
PROVE: Function destructures a struct with mut field, creating a mutable local copy; Update assigns to field = new_value instead of *field = new_value
FALSIFY: Dereference to update stored value

cards.securePattern: Dereference to update stored value
cards.validWhen: mut left is a local copy, not a mutable reference
cards.invalidWhen: Dereference to update stored value

cards.title: Pattern 15: Variable Shadowing Corrupts Recorded Values — move-arith-015
cards.detect: `let value = 0` shadows the `_value` parameter
check: VERIFY: let value = 0 shadows the _value parameter
PROVE: A function declares let value = 0; which shadows an input parameter _value; All subsequent uses refer to the shadowed zero instead of the parameter
FALSIFY: Assign to existing variable instead of re-declaring

cards.antipattern: `let value = 0` shadows the `_value` parameter
cards.securePattern: Assign to existing variable instead of re-declaring
cards.validWhen: let value = 0 shadows the _value parameter
cards.invalidWhen: Assign to existing variable instead of re-declaring

cards.title: Pattern 16: Negative-to-Unsigned Conversion Produces Incorrect Magnitude — move-arith-016
cards.detect: Negative `base` produces inflated u64 from to_balance
check: VERIFY: Negative base produces inflated u64 from to_balance
PROVE: Protocol uses a signed fixed-point library (ifixed) with values stored as u256 with a sign bit; A negative value is passed to ifixed::to_balance() which tries to convert...
FALSIFY: Check sign before conversion
ANTIPATTERN: Accumulated slippage can make balance_to_withdraw negative
cards.antipattern: Accumulated slippage can make balance_to_withdraw negative
cards.securePattern: Check sign before conversion
cards.validWhen: Negative base produces inflated u64 from to_balance
cards.invalidWhen: Check sign before conversion

cards.title: Pattern 17: Division by Zero in Pool/Staking Operations — move-arith-017
cards.detect: weight can be 0 for low-stake nodes
check: VERIFY: weight can be 0 for low-stake nodes
PROVE: Protocol performs division by total supply, weight, or reserve that can be zero; Zero occurs when pool is empty, node has no stake, or all tokens are drained
FALSIFY: Guard against zero denominators

cards.antipattern: reserve_a can be 0 if pool is fully drained

cards.detect: a + b - 1 can overflow
check: VERIFY: a + b - 1 can overflow
PROVE: Protocol uses divide_and_round_up(a, b) = (a + b - 1) / b; When a is close to u128::MAX or u256::MAX, a + b - 1 overflows

cards.securePattern: Avoid intermediate overflow

cards.title: Pattern 19: Overflow in Signed Fixed-Point Multiplication Check — move-arith-019
cards.detect: Treats sign bit as overflow
check: VERIFY: Treats sign bit as overflow
PROVE: Signed fixed-point library uses GREATEST_BIT to detect sign/overflow; When one operand is negative, the raw product has the sign bit set
FALSIFY: Separate overflow check from sign handling
cards.antipattern: Treats sign bit as overflow
cards.securePattern: Separate overflow check from sign handling

cards.invalidWhen: Separate overflow check from sign handling

cards.title: Pattern 20: Zero Mint After Fixed-Point Precision Loss — move-arith-020
cards.detect: Non-zero fixed-point can become zero after conversion
check: VERIFY: Non-zero fixed-point can become zero after conversion
PROVE: Protocol checks lp_to_mint != 0 at fixed-point precision; Converts to balance via ifixed::to_balance(lp_to_mint, scaling)

cards.securePattern: Check after conversion to actual balance
cards.validWhen: Non-zero fixed-point can become zero after conversion
cards.invalidWhen: Check after conversion to actual balance

cards.title: Pattern 21: Faulty Constant Definition Corrupts Bit Manipulation — move-arith-021
cards.detect: 15 hex chars instead of 16
check: VERIFY: 15 hex chars instead of 16

cards.title: Pattern 22: Excess Recall/Withdrawal Rounded Beyond Available Reserves — move-arith-022

check: VERIFY: Rounding up can exceed available funds
